title: About
text: I am PhD candidate at the University of Bristol, supervised by Dr. Andy Young. I work on modelling the innermost regions of the accretion flow in Active Galactic Nuclei, both in the spectral and time domain. I am also a part of the TALES doctoral network. I completed my master’s at the Anton Pannekoek Institute, University of Amsterdam where I got to work with Dr. Phil Uttley on studying Quasi-Periodic Oscillations in X-ray binaries using the bispectrum.

title: Shashanth Sriramanathan
text: I am PhD candidate at the University of Bristol, supervised by Dr. Andy Young. I work on modelling the innermost regions of the accretion flow in Active Galactic Nuclei, both in the spectral and time domain. I am also a part of the TALES doctoral network. I am broadly interested in anything to do with accretion physics in compact objects, ranging from X-ray binaries to AGN.
